___login_guide__after_saving_and_startin: Login: After saving the settings and starting the adapter, a login URL appears as a warning in the log and also in the instance auth.loginUrl object. Open this URL in your browser to sign in with your Xiaomi account. The adapter then connects automatically.
how_often_device_status_is_fetched_via_t: Defines how often the device status is fetched via the API.
minimum_time_between_automatic_login_att: If enabled, no additional automatic login attempts are started during runtime after the initial startup attempt.
